ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "record_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "age_at_diagnosis" INTEGER /* Age of the patient at the time of diagnosis */,
  "month_of_diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the month of diagnosis */,
  "year_of_diagnosis" INTEGER /* Year of diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* Code for the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_month_of_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_of_diagnosis_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vital_status" (
  "vital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vital status record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current vital status of the patient */,
  "study_cutoff_date" TEXT /* Date of the study cutoff used for vital status */,
  "date_of_last_contact" TEXT /* Date of last contact with the patient */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vital_status_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_up" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "month_of_follow_up_id" INTEGER /* ID of the month of follow-up */,
  "year_of_follow_up" INTEGER /* Year of follow-up */,
  "end_calc_vital_status" TEXT /* End calculation vital status */,
  "begin_calc_age" INTEGER /* Begin calculation age */,
  "number_of_intervals" INTEGER /* Number of intervals calculated */,
  "follow_up_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_up_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_up_month_of_follow_up_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_of_follow_up_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age of the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis_codes" (
  "diagnosis_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis code */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the diagnosis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "lab_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "lab_test_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab test */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the lab test */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date of the lab test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
